[PDF_PAGE 63 | score=5] Golem, General CLIMATE TERRAIN: FREQUENCY: rare ORGANIZATION: Solitary ACTIVITY CYCLE: DIET: Nil INTELLIGENCE: Non- (0) TREASURE: Nil ALIGNMENT: Neutral Golems are magically created automatons of great power. The construction of one involves mighty magics and elemental forces_ Background: Golems predate any known writings. The wizard who discovered the process, if indeed there was only one 1S not known Some of the rediscoverers have written down their se - crets in various arcane manuals, enchanted to aid the reader in constructing the golem . It is thought that the first golem created was ] flesh possibly an accident of some great wizard ex- perimenting with reanima human bodies. Flesh gole
